---
title: "Page 1 - Assessment Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec03-sp01"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec03"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Assessment

_Clear explanation of what the learner needs to do for this assessment._

---

## Questions

_Add the set of questions here (e.g., MCQs, short answer prompts, or applied tasks)._

---

## Your response

_Provide guidance on how the learner should submit or record their responses (e.g., "Write your answer below", "Upload your file to...")._

---

## Feedback and guidance

_Add optional feedback, model answers, or guidance for self-checking responses._

---

## Criteria

_Outline any marking criteria or specific expectations for a high-quality response._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Assessment and Interaction</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec03-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 2 - Interactive Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
